initial_draft:
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I must reject the proposal. If I accept, I will still have nothing, and Player RED will gain 25 Dollars. It is better for me to reject and end the game immediately rather than accept an unfair proposal. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to trade, so I must reject the proposal. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: The response contains all required tags in the correct order, and the content is valid. The <newly proposed trade> is correctly set to NONE since the player answered REJECT.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources and cannot benefit from the trade, rejecting is the only logical move. There is no alternative split that would improve Player BLUE's payoff.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Player BLUE has no resources to trade, so any proposal would be rejected. It is not possible for Player BLUE to make a proposal that would be accepted in this scenario.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <newly proposed trade> are consistent with each other. The <message> also aligns with the decision to reject.

5. Rule compliance: OK. Player BLUE is on move 1/4 and is allowed to reject. The response respects all rules and constraints.
</critique>
